Name: Belkin SoundForm Headphones with Lightning Connector, White
Short description:
SoundForm Headphones with Lightning Connector \n
  • Cable length 112cm/44"
  • SOUNDFORM Headphones with Lightning Connector
  • Silicone ear tips
  • MFi-approved
Description:
Overview

TAKE A JOURNEY INTO SOUND
With high quality sound, supreme comfort and fit, and exceptional durability, SOUNDFORM Headphones with Lightning Connector are the headphones you, and your iPhone, have been waiting for. Packed with features, including water-resistance and noise-isolation, these compact headphones deliver superior audio without distraction – so you can lose yourself in music, be transported to a different world with an audio book, or experience the highs and lows of every story with compelling podcast content.
THE BELKIN DIFFERENCE
  • Pioneer in innovation and technology for over 35 years
  • Innovative design provides a perfect fit to your ear for superior sound and noise isolation
  • Comprehensive testing procedures guarantee quality and durability
  • MFi-approved for added peace of mind
A PERFECT FIT FOR A PERFECT SOUND
Perfectly-fitting headphones create a far superior sound. SOUNDFORM headphones combine ear tips that can be tailored to your ear, with a design that actively directs the sound towards your eardrum. The result is excellent noise isolation, so you can be sure you are experiencing the music as the artist intended. Every drumbeat, every lyric, every instrument and every breath in the original recording is clearly replicated for your ear. With playback this flawless, the only thing that might get lost is you.
COMFORT IS MUSIC TO YOUR EARS
Poorly-fitting earbuds are a main contributor to headphone discomfort. With three differently-sized ear tips provided with SOUNDFORM headphones, it's easy to find the right fit for a more comfortable listening experience. Holding the ear tips, angled drivers reduce strain on your ear, so you can enjoy all-day comfort, and listen to the music you love, for as long as you like.
SWEAT AND SPLASH-RESISTANT
Wherever you listen to music, your SOUNDFORM headphones are designed to go with you. This is why we made them sweat and splash-resistant – making them ideal for all-weather use, as well as fitness or gym sessions.
LONG LASTING DURABILITY
Over 35 years' experience in designing cables has taught us a few things. SOUNDFORM headphones are highly flexible and reinforced at major stress points, to withstand heavy use in multiple environments. Comprehensive testing procedures, covering everything from sustained usage to extreme environmental conditions, guarantee durability.
TANGLE-FREE
The flat, lightweight design keeps the headphone cable tangle-free in a pocket or bag. When in use, the cable management feature keeps excess cable out of your way, and positions the microphone for easy, hands-free calling.
PUTTING YOU IN CONTROL
Your SOUNDFORM headphones are ready to use straight out of the box – no adapter or prior charging required. The multi-control button makes it easy to play, pause, skip tracks, change volume or answer a phone call at the touch of a button. The clear, built-in microphone makes it easy to take calls without removing the headphones.
A WARRANTY YOU CAN TRUST
We are dedicated to quality and provide a 2-Year Limited Warranty with your SOUNDFORM Headphones with Lightning Connector. This product is engineered and tested to ensure flawless performance even with heavy use. Specs: Cable length 112cm/44"   Package Includes:
  • SOUNDFORM Headphones with Lightning Connector
  • Silicone ear tips, size S, M, L

Name: Belkin BoostCharge Pro Flex USB-C to USB-C Cable
Short description:
Increase the durability and flexibility of your charge. Built with a double-braided exterior, BoostCharge Pro Flex silicone cables are up to 30x more durable*. Includes a magnetic cable management system. Available in 4 stylish colors and 3 lengths. \n
  • 5-year warranty
  • Comes in three sizes, 1m/3.3ft., 2m/6.6ft. or 3m/10ft.
  • Tested to survive 30,000+ bends
  • 30X more durable* than ordinary PVC cables
\n
Description:
Overview

Built to last.
Highly durable cable tested to withstand 30,000+ bends,* these USB-C cables are built for a long lifespan and will work with any standard USB-C port. They're also USB-IF certified for safe and seamless performance with all your devices.
Plug into a Fast Charge.
This USB-C to USB-C cable supports USB-C PD fast charging, powering a Samsung S23 Ultra from 0-50% in 27 minutes**.
Our most durable cable yet.
Get up to 30x more durability* than ordinary cables. BoostCharge Pro Flex silicone cables are engineered with a fray-resistant double braided nylon exterior, giving you a long-lasting cable that’s flexible and easy to use. Includes a cable management strap to keep things tidy.
Wide compatibility.
Universally compatible with your Samsung S23, iPad Pro and other USB-C devices.
USB 2.0 data transfer + USB-IF certified.
Our USB 2.0-ready cable transfers data at a top speed of 480 Mbps. It’s certified by USB-IF to meet all electrical, mechanical and environmental standards, ensuring a superior user experience.
Choose the length you need.
Available in three convenient lengths (1M/3.3-foot, 2M/6.6-foot, and 3M/10-foot) so you can better connect and charge a device in the car, on the nightstand, and more.

Name: Belkin BoostCharge USB-C to USB-C Cable 100W
Short description:
Power and connect to a MacBook, Chromebook, Windows laptop, iPad, or other USB-C device with an extra-long, double-braided cable. Compatible with USB-C PD to support up to 100W charging, it delivers safe and optimal charging speeds for a variety of devices. \n
  • fast charging up to 100W
  • 2-year warranty
  • available in 2M/6.6ft or 3M/10ft lengths
  • Extra-long cable
Description:
Overview

Built to last.
Highly durable cable tested to withstand 30,000+ bends,* these USB-C cables are built for a long lifespan and will work with any standard USB-C port. They're also USB-IF certified for safe and seamless performance with all your devices.
Safe power and fast charging.
Beneath its rugged exterior, our USB-C to USB-C cable is engineered to support up to 100W of power delivery — enough power to charge most laptops including MacBook, Chromebook, and more.
Superior USB-C cable construction.
Precision welded metal shield to protect PCB and E Marker. This also minimizes radiated emissions levels and provides additional mechanical strength.
Wide compatibility.
Universally compatible with your Samsung S23, iPad Pro and other USB-C devices.
USB 2.0 data transfer + USB-IF certified.
Our USB 2.0-ready cable transfers data at a top speed of 480 Mbps. It’s certified by USB-IF to meet all electrical, mechanical and environmental standards, ensuring a superior user experience.
Choose the length you need.
Available in two convenient lengths (2M/6.6-foot and 3M/10-foot) so you can better connect and charge a device in the car, on the nightstand, and more.

Name: Belkin Protective Laptop Sleeve with Shoulder Strap for 11-13"
Short description:
Protective Laptop Sleeve with Shoulder Strap for 11-13" \n
  • Designed to slip easily inside a backpack
  • Name tag to identify which device is theirs
  • Comes with a shoulder strap and carrying handle
Description:
Overview

Laptop Protection for Anywhere
Keep your laptop protected from daily wear and tear with our Protective Laptop Sleeve with Shoulder Strap for 11-13” Devices. Ideal for classroom and professional use, these lightweight sleeves are designed to protect a MacBook, Chromebook, or other laptop when not in use. It’s easy to transport with its convenient shoulder strap and carrying handle. The easy-to-clean black finish maintains a sleek look even after heavy use. Our Protective Sleeve fits most 11-13" laptops.
Reduce Wear and Tear
Our Protective Laptop Sleeve with Shoulder Strap provides scratch and wear and tear protection for your MacBook, Chromebook, or other laptop while on the go and in the classroom, office, or home.
Lightweight and Portable
Our lightweight laptop sleeve comes with a shoulder strap and carrying handle for easy portability. Its thin exterior makes it a cinch to store inside a backpack or briefcase.
Fits 11-13” Laptops
Our Protective Laptop Sleeve with Shoulder Strap is designed for use with 11-13” devices. Also available in a larger size that fits 14-15" devices.
Includes Name Tag
Our Protective Laptop Sleeve with Shoulder Strap features a name tag so you can easily identify which device is yours.

Name: Belkin 2.4 Amp USB Charging 8-outlet Surge Protection Strip
Short description:
2.4 Amp USB Charging 8-outlet Surge Protection Strip
  • Eight protected AC outlets
  • two 2.4 amp USB ports maximum combined
  • Rated to withstand a power surge of up to 900 joules
  • Damage-resistant
Description:
Overview

EIGHT-OUTLET PROTECTION WITH TWO USB PORTS
Keep your electronic devices protected from dangerous power surges and spikes with the Belkin 8-Outlet Surge Protection Strip with 2 USB Ports. Simply plug the surge protection strip into any AC wall outlet and connect up to eight AC and two USB devices to keep them safe from power surges, lightning strikes, and AC contamination. Ideal for televisions, stereo systems, cable boxes, and other home theater equipment, the Belkin Surge Protection Strip is made with high-quality construction and enhanced circuitry to offer premium power protection for your high-end devices and data. Please note: The protective components inside surge protectors absorb over-voltage spikes to protect your connected devices which means they will eventually wear out. Replace them every 3 years or immediately after any over-voltage spike event such as a thunderstorm or power outage because surge protectors degrade faster if they are exposed to high intensity events. Periodically check the surge protector enclosure and cable for signs of wear or heat distress. Replace an expired surge protector with a new one at the end of its useful life.
PROTECTS AGAINST SPIKES AND FLUCTUATIONS
Connecting your electronic devices to the Belkin Surge Protection Strip protects them from unexpected power surges, such as short circuits and lightning strikes. The surge protection strip also keeps your devices safe from sudden voltage fluctuations or low-level spikes and drops that can damage or even destroy electronics over time.
TWO 2.4 AMP USB PORTS FOR CHARGING
Charge your portable devices quickly while protecting them from damage and data loss thanks to two integrated USB ports. Ideal for smartphones, tablets, these USB ports charge at 2.4 amps*, offering faster charging times than traditional USB ports, with added protection.
SURGE PROTECTION UP TO 900 JOULES
This surge protection strip is rated to handle up to 900 joules and is designed to shield home theater and office electronics against harmful voltage fluctuations, surges, and energy spikes. Oversize metal oxide varistors (MOVs) absorb excess electricity and release it as heat. Fiberglass MOV covers also help contain or smother fire if a large surge causes the MOVs to ignite.
PROTECTED OUTLETS WITH RECESSED POWER SWITCH
The Belkin Surge Protection Strip features high-quality construction and a durable design with damage-resistant housing that protects circuits from fire, impact, and rust. Eight protected AC outlets make this strip an ideal solution for home offices, entertainment centers, and other areas where multiple devices need to be connected. A large recessed power switch helps ensure you never accidentally power off your connected devices and makes reboots easy, while sliding safety covers help protect children from harm. The Belkin Surge Protection Strip also includes a Not-Grounded Indicator that warns you when your outlet is not properly grounded.
HEAVY-DUTY 2-METER POWER CORD
Protect your connected devices while keeping the Belkin Surge Protection Strip out of the way thanks to a 2-meter power cord. A heavy-duty design helps protect the cord from damage and ensures optimal power flow to your devices.
COMPLETE THREE-LINE AC PROTECTION
The Belkin Surge Protection Strip keeps connected devices safe with three-line AC protection. This type of protection guards against surges that occur between hot, neutral, and ground lines.
£60,000 CONNECTED EQUIPMENT WARRANTY
This surge protection strip comes with a Connected Equipment Warranty, which means we will repair or replace electronic equipment damaged by an electrical surge or lightning strike while properly connected to the strip, up to £60,000 in the United Kingdom.

Name: Belkin Connect Universal USB-C® Triple Display Dock
Short description:
Create a connected workstation and display on up to 3 additional 4K monitors with our Universal USB-C Triple Display Dock. Its DisplayLink technology* supports universal video compatibility for MacBook, Windows, and Chromebook laptops. \n
  • Comes with a 150W PSU & USB-C to USB-C cable
  • 3 extended displays in up to 4K video resolutions
  • 5x USB-A, USB-C, Gigabit Ethernet
  • audio in/out ports USB-C PD charging up to 85W
Description:
Overview

A Connected Workstation for More Devices
Display up to 4K video resolutions on up to three monitors with our Universal USB-C® Triple Display Dock. Its DisplayLink™ technology easily connects your monitors to any computer, including MacBook, Chromebook, and Windows laptops. Our docking station features multiple video ports—2x DisplayPort and 3x HDMI—for convenient and flexible video connections. Access all the peripherals you’ll need with 5x USB-A ports and a USB-C port, as well as Gigabit Ethernet, 35mm audio in/out, and up to 85W of USB-C PD power.
The Ultimate, Connected Work Station
  1. USB-C 3.0
  2. USB-A 3.0
  3. 3.5 mm Audio Out
  4. 3.5 mm Audio In
  5. 85W PD USB-C 3.0
  6. Gigabit Ethernet
  7. 3x HDMI
  8. 2x DisplayPort
  9. 4x USB-A 3.0

Name: Belkin 14-Port USB-C Docking Station, 65W (Chromebook Certified)
Short description:
• 65W Pass-Through USB-C Power Delivery
  • supports resolution up to 4K
  • 3.5mm combination in/out audio jack
  • Connect up to 3 displays
Description:
Overview

  • 1Description
  • 2Multiple Monitors, Multiple Ports
  • 3Works With Chromebook Certified
  • 465W Power Delivery 3.0
  • 5TAA-Compliant
Break free from limited ports and create your workspace with the TAA-compliant Belkin 14-Port USB-C Docking Station with 65W Power Delivery. Made for the office, home, or classroom, it supports up to three external monitors with resolutions up to 3840 x 2160 at 60 Hz. Connect your external SSD, mouse, keyboard, headphones, and other USB peripherals to the 10 Gb/s USB-A and USB-C ports, while reducing desktop clutter with a single USB-C cable delivering 65W of pass-through power to your laptop or compatible device. This dock is "Works with Chromebook" certified, with the ability to install firmware updates directly through ChromeOS for an enhanced connectivity experience.
Multiple Monitors, Multiple Ports
By plugging in a single USB-C cable, this dock allows you to connect up to three external monitors simultaneously on laptops with MST capabilities so you can enjoy sharper-looking, more detailed images, and visualize content across extended displays. Monitor resolutions up to 3840 x 2160 are supported. Connect external flash drives and peripherals such as mice, keyboards, and printers with the available USB-C and USB-A ports. Supporting up to 10 Gb/s, the dock allows quick transfer of large data files.
Note:
ChromeOS supports up to two extended monitors.
Works With Chromebook Certified
This USB-C dock is a Chrome-certified product. Works With Chromebook products have gone through extensive testing for Chromebook compatibility, with the ability to install any needed firmware updates directly via ChromeOS.
Note:
This product works with devices capable of running the latest version of ChromeOS. It is not recommended for Mac users.
65W Power Delivery 3.0
Simultaneous pass-through charge up to 65W to your laptop and multiple accessories while working, streaming, or gaming. Plus, USB-C PD 3.0 technology keeps you connected to devices even when your power source becomes disconnected.
TAA-Compliant
This docking station is TAA-complaint for use in a wide range of government applications.
UPC: 745883815722

In the Box

  • Belkin 14-Port USB-C Docking Station with 65W Power Delivery (Chromebook Certified)
  • 135W Power Supply
  • USB-C to USB-C Cable (3.3')
  • Limited 2-Year Manufacturer Warranty

Name: Belkin USB-C Dual Display Docking Station
Short description:
Make the most of your Mac, Windows or Chromebook device with easy access to monitors, ethernet, power and peripherals. Our docking station features 8 ports and 85W of convenient passthrough power to charge your device while you work. \n
  • 85W Power Delivery
  • 3.5mm combination in/out audio jack
  • Connect your laptop to two full HD monitors
  • Includes 135W power supply
Description:
Belkin USB-C Dual Display Docking Station – Black

  • (Connect 2 HD Displays) Display in high resolution on all monitors and run multiple applications on two screens. This allows you to connect your laptop to two 1080p monitors simultaneously, allowing you to enjoy clearer and detailed images or display content across the entire two expansion displays. Also compatible with M1 MacBook dual display
  • 【1 Dock, Multiple Ports】Connecting your important machine to this product will provide enough power and easy to handle. Port types include HDMI, USB-A, USB-C, Gigabit Ethernet, and audio input and output. Kensington locks can also be installed for added security
  • 【Reliable Ethernet Connection】If the Wi-Fi is not stable, we recommend a wired internet connection. This product offers a high speed internet connection up to 1Gbps, allowing you to perform high-speed data transmission, online conferences without interruption
  • 【85W Power Supply】Charge your laptop and accessories while working, streaming, or gaming. It has a USB-C port that supports pass-through charging and can provide up to 85W of power from the outlet to your device
  • 【Belkin DisplayLink Technology】DisplayLink graphics technology works between computing platform and connector types, so you can work with almost any monitor and system. *Simply connect your MacBook, PC, Chromebook, and use the same large display, keyboard or mouse on any device. Whether you’re working, streaming or playing games, you can easily connect and achieve a stable ultra-low delay connection

Name: Belkin Connect USB-C 11-in-1 Multiport Dock
Short description:
• charging up to 100W
  • 5 Gbps of bandwidth
  • Connect to multiple devices at the same time
  • Doubles as a laptop stand
Description:
'

Overview

The Ultimate Workspace Solution
Turn your USB-C laptop into the ultimate workstation with our USB-C 11-in-1 Multiport Dock. This all-in-one solution gives you access to ports that newer laptops have eliminated in the recent years, allowing you to connect to monitors, SD cards, thumb drives, and more through its USB-C port. It supports pass-through charging up to 100W so you don’t have to choose between port expansion and power. This docking station gives you up to 5 Gbps of bandwidth between connected devices and your laptop while supporting high-definition display resolutions up to 4K through HDMI, DisplayPort, and VGA video ports. Plus, with its Gigabit Ethernet port, you’ll always have a safe and secure internet connection.  
100W Pass-through Power
Supports pass-through charging up to 100W, minus 15W for the dock's operation*. Power your laptop without sacrificing power for port expansion.
Doubles as a Stand
Our compact 11-in-1 docking station doubles as a laptop stand so you can create the ultimate workstation without giving up desk space. Plus, all the ports are located in the back for easy access and use.
Up To 5 Gbps Data Transfer
Turn up the bandwidth. Get 5 Gbps data transfer between your computer and peripheral devices with our USB-C 11-in-1 Multiport Dock.
Get the Connections You Need
Get up to 4K resolutions on multiple displays with HDMI, DisplayPort, and VGA video ports.
  1. 3.5mm audio in/out
  2. VGA port
  3. SD 3.0 card reader
  4. MicroSD 3.0 card reader
  5. Gigabit Ethernet port
  6. USB-A 3.0 BC1.2 ports
  7. USB-A 2.0 port
  8. 4K DisplayPort 1.2
  9. 4K HDMI 1.4
  10. USB-C PD port
*Windows supports MST (Multi-Stream Transport) to offer extended displays **MacOS supports SST (Single Stream Transport) only to offer mirror displays MacBook 12" models introduced in 2015, 2016, 2017 have only one single USB-C port Not compatible with MacBooks - M1 (2020)  
Specs
  1. 260 mm / 10.2 in
  2. 90 mm / 3.5 in
  3. 23 mm / 0.9 in
  4. 162 mm / 6.4 in
Weight: 348.8 g  / 0.8 lb

Name: Belkin Connect USB-C 6-in-1 Multiport Adapter
Short description:
This all-in-one solution expands your computer’s USB-C port into an HDMI port, 2 USB-A 3.0 ports, Gigabit Ethernet port, ​SD card reader, and USB-C PD port, giving you ports newer laptops have eliminated in recent years. \n
  • Supports pass-through charging up to 100W
  • 5 Gbps of bandwidth
  • HDMI port supports up to 4K resolutions at 30Hz
  • Connect a USB-C laptop to multiple devices
Description:
Overview

Expand Your Laptop’s Capabilities
Easily connect your laptop to multiple devices with our USB-C 6-in-1 Multiport Adapter. This all-in-one solution expands your computer’s USB-C port into an HDMI port, 2 USB-A ports, Ethernet port, ​SD card reader, and USB-C PD port, giving you the ports newer laptops have eliminated in recent years. Plus, it supports pass-through charging up to 100W, eliminating the need to choose between port expansion and power. The slim, compact, and travel-ready design of our USB-C 6-in-1 Multiport Adapter is ideal for those who have multiple workstations or looking to declutter their desk. Supports 4K resolutions and up to 5 Gbps of bandwidth for fast data transfer between laptop and peripheral devices.
Power and Connect
Supports pass-through charging up to 100W (minus 12W for the adapter’s operation*). Power your laptop without sacrificing power for port expansion.
Slim and Compact
Small, but powerful. This adapter’s compact size makes it easy to move between workstations and takes up little desk space when in use.
Connect to Multiple Devices
  1. Gigabit Ethernet port
  2. USB-C PD 3.0 port
  3. SD 2.0 Card reader
  4. 2x USB-A 3.0 BC1.2 ports
  5. 4K HDMI 1.4 port
Up To 5 Gbps Data Transfer
Turn up the bandwidth. Get up to 5 Gbps data transfer between your computer and peripheral devices with our USB-C 6-in-1 Multiport Adapter.
Get 4K Resolution
Get access to high-definition resolutions—up to 4K—through the dedicated HDMI port.
Specs
  1. 117 mm / 4.6 in
  2. 47 mm / 1.9 in
  3. 16 mm / 0.6 in
  4. 125 mm / 5 in
Weight: 89.4g / 0.2lb

Name: Belkin Connect USB-C to HDMI 2.1 Adapter (8K, 4K, HDR compatible)
Short description:
Connect a Chromebook, MacBook, PC, or other USB-C host devices to an HDMI display with our 7.5” USB-C to HDMI Adapter. It supports resolutions up to 8K@60Hz and up to 4K@144Hz, giving you a convenient, plug-and-play adapter for a variety of displays. \n
  • Tethered USB-C cable
  • Supports up to 8K @60Hz & 4K @144Hz
  • Crystal clear video with HDR10+
  • USB-IF Certified
Description:
Overview

Upgrade your display setup with the Belkin USB-C to HDMI 2.1 Adapter, engineered for high resolution, high refresh rate, and secure content streaming. It’s built for creators, gamers, and media lovers who want reliable video output from laptops, tablets, smartphones, or any USB-C-enabled devices. Perfect for external monitors, TVs, projectors, or even dual-screen workflows.

Key Features

Feature What it Does / Why It Matters
High Res & High Frame-Rate Support Output up to 8K at 60Hz or 4K at 144Hz, delivering sharp, fluid visuals whether you’re streaming, editing video, or gaming.
HDR10+ & Vivid Colour Supports HDR10+ for enhanced contrast, brightness, and more lifelike color in games, movies, or content that support HDR.
Advanced Display Protocols Includes HBR3 (High Bit-Rate 3) and DSC (Display Stream Compression) to handle high-bandwidth video signals without degradation.
Protected Content Support (HDCP 2.2, iTunes/Netflix etc.) Ensures that streaming services and DRM-secured content (like Netflix, iTunes) play without issues.
USB-IF / WWCB Certified This certification gives assurance of compliance, interoperability, and that quality standards are met.
Durability & Build Comes with a tethered USB-C cable (~7.5″ / 110 mm) for convenience, a robust build tested for thousands of bends, and quality materials.
Compatibility Works with a variety of USB-C devices: laptops, tablets, PCs, phones, projectors, TVs. Plug & play for systems that support USB-C with video output (DisplayPort Alt Mode).

Technical Specs

  • Maximum Resolutions: 8K @ 60Hz, 4K @ 144Hz

  • HDR Support: HDR10+

  • Protocols: HBR3, Display Stream Compression (DSC)

  • Content Protection: HDCP 2.2, Supports iTunes / Netflix protected content

  • Cable Type: Tethered USB-C to HDMI adapter (~7.5 in / 110 mm)

  • Certifications: USB-IF / WWCB certified

  • Durability: Tested for ~2,500 bends

  • Warranty: 2 years manufacturer warranty

What You Get (In-Box)

  • The Belkin USB-C to HDMI 2.1 Adapter

  • Quick start guide / regulatory information

Ideal Use-Cases

  • Connecting modern laptops or tablets to external 4K/8K displays, for work or creative tasks

  • Gaming at high refresh rates (especially 4K@120-144Hz) for smoother motion

  • Streaming protected content (Netflix, iTunes, etc.) without worrying about DRM issues

  • Travel or mobile setups: the adapter is compact and uses a short tethered cable, reducing cable clutter

Things to Check / Consider

  • Your source device (laptop/tablet/phone) must support USB-C video output (DisplayPort Alt Mode) and sufficient bandwidth; otherwise, you won’t get full 8K/144Hz performance.

  • The display or monitor should have HDMI 2.1 input and support corresponding refresh rates/resolutions. If the display is older (HDMI 2.0 or less), performance may be limited.

  • For best quality, use high-quality HDMI cables (rated for HDMI 2.1 bandwidth) from the adapter to the display.

Name: Belkin BoostCharge Power Bank 10K, Black
Short description:
Get 40* extra hours of battery life for your iPhone 14/13/12 or charge up to 3 devices at once with up to 15W combined from 2 USB-A ports and 1 USB-C port. A USB-A to USB-C cable is included so you can start charging right out of the box. \n
  • 10,000 mAh provides 40* extra hours
  • 3 devices at once with up to 15W combined
  • 2 USB-A ports, 1 USB-C port
  • 2-year warranty
Description:
Overview

Charge 3 Devices at Once
Two USB-A ports and one USB-C port keep all your devices charged, providing up to 15W of power for your smartphone and two other accessories. Charge at up to 15W when using all 3 ports, adding up to an additional 40* hours of battery life for your smartphone. Binge watch movies, take video calls, and keep your navigation apps running all the way to your destination. An LED light indicates when the power bank needs recharging, and the included USB-A to USB-C cable lets you start charging right out of the box.
Up to an Additional 40* Hours of Battery Life
10,000 mAh of power fully recharges an iPhone 12 twice, and keeps your smart devices running when an outlet is out of reach.
Versatile Power for 3 Devices at Once
Charge your smartphone and other devices with up to 15W of power from 2 USB-A ports and 1 USB-C port.
Charging Cable Included
A USB-A to USB-C cable is included so you can start charging right out of the box, and it can also be used to recharge the power bank when needed.
LED Indicator Light
An LED light tells you the power bank’s power status, so you always know when it’s time to recharge.
Specs
  1. 2.69in / 68.33mm
  2. 5.19in / 131.83mm
  3. 0.62in / 15.75mm
Weight: 0.49lbs / 222g

Name: Belkin BoostCharge 30W USB-C Car Charger
Short description:
Fast charge iPhone, Samsung, and Google phones and tablets with our compact USB-C Power Delivery-equipped 30W car charger. \n
  • 30W of fast in-car charging
  • USB-IF certified
  • 2-Year product warranty
  • 100% plastic free packaging
Description:
Overview

Quick charging on the road.
Get more out of your commute with our compact and powerful BoostCharge 30W USB-C Car Charger. The PPS technology automatically adjusts the wattage based on your connected device. USB-IF certification assures safe and effective charging to your compatible device.
PPS for the fastest, safer charging.
Our car charger is optimized for iPhone, Samsung, and more, giving you an on-the-go solution for a variety of devices. Programmable Power Supply technology dynamically adjusts the charger’s power output to fit the needs of your connected device

Name: Belkin BoostCharge Dual USB-A Wall Charger 24W + USB-A to Micro-USB cable
Short description:
• 24W/4.8 amps total output
  • 2-year warranty
  • Dual ports charge two devices at once
  • Compatible with USB-A cable
Description:
Power more than one device with ease using the Belkin BoostCharge Dual-USB A 24W Wall Charger. Designed to handle two devices at once, this agile charger delivers reliable, fast charging from two USB-A ports — perfect for phones, tablets, power banks, or any USB-A powered gadget. Also included is a 1-metre / 3.3-foot USB-A to Micro-USB cable, so you're ready to charge straight away.

Key Features
Feature Detail
Total Power Output 24 W (4.8 A) total across both ports.
Per-Port Output Each USB-A port delivers up to ~12 W when both are in use.
Included Cable USB-A to Micro-USB cable (≈1 m / 3.3 ft) included.
Dimensions Approx. 2.20 in × 1.14 in × 2.28 in (≈ 56 mm × 29 mm × 58 mm). Compact size for travel or crowded sockets.
Safety & Warranty 2-year limited warranty + Connected Equipment Warranty up to USD $2,500. Built-in protections for over-voltage, overheating, etc.
Advantages

  • Dual-device charging: Since it has two USB-A ports, you can charge two devices simultaneously without needing separate chargers.

  • Faster than basic chargers: With 12 W per port (when both used), it gives significantly quicker charging than older 5 W chargers.

  • Convenient full kit: Comes with the cable you need for many older Androids / accessories, so no extra purchase needed for those using Micro-USB.

  • Ideal for travel or tight outlets: Compact footprint, dual ports make it space-efficient.

Potential Limitations

  • Since both ports share the total 24 W budget, if you plug in two power-hungry devices, each will get less than when used alone.

  • The cable is Micro-USB—not USB-C—so users of USB-C only devices will need their own compatible cable.

  • It’s not a fast-charging standard like USB-Power Delivery or Qualcomm Quick Charge; if you need those, there are higher-powered chargers.

Name: Belkin BoostCharge USB-C PD 3.0 PPS Wall Charger 25W + USB-C Cable
Short description:
• delivers up to 25W
  • USB-C PD 3.0 certified
  • 3.3 ft / 1m USB-C to USB-C cable
  • Compact, travel-ready design
Description:
Overview

A Smarter, Faster Charger
Charge your Samsung or other smartphone from 0-50% in 26 minutes† with our 25W USB-C® PD 3.0 PPS Wall Charger. Upgrade your standard in-box power supply with a universal USB-C PD 3.0 certified charger that gives an optimal charge for newer Samsung, Google, and other smartphones in a compact and travel-ready design . Equipped with PPS technology which allows optimized charging with compatible devices by dynamically negotiating the best charging voltage, delivering up to 25W for Samsung smartphones and 20W for other smartphones. Comes with a USB-C to USB-C cable for out-of-box use.
Optimized for Samsung and iPhone
Get optimal charging power with our 25W USB-C PD 3.0 PPS Wall Charger. This fast and universal charging solution is optimized for both iPhone and Samsung smartphones, as well as other USB-C PD enabled devices.
  • Fast charge with a single convenient phone charger for iPhone, Samsung, and other USB-C PD enabled devices
  • USB-C PD 3.0 charges up to 20W for iPhone 8 or later and USB-C PD 3.0 PPS charges up to 25W for Samsung phones
  • Fast charge an iPhone 8 or later from 0-50% in 30 minutes††
  • Charge Samsung Galaxy S20+ from 0-50% in 26 minutes†††
Dynamic Power
Safely recharge your phone faster than ever with the intelligence of Programmable Power Standard. PPS technology enables the power supply to dynamically adjust its output based on the device it’s connected to, delivering the exact amount of power needed for the ideal charge.
USB-C PD 3.0 Certified
Our PPS Wall Charger is also USB-C PD 3.0 certified, which means it’s safe, compliant, and meets required specifications for your compatible device.
Compact and Travel-Ready
All the power and speed you’ll need in a compact, travel-ready design.
Cable Included
Everything you need to get going. Includes a 3.3 ft / 1m USB-C to USB-C cable for out of box charging.

Name: Belkin BoostCharge USB-C® Wall Charger 20W
Short description:
Safely fast charge an iPhone, iPad, Samsung Galaxy, or other compatible device with our powerful and travel-ready 20W USB-C Wall Charger.* \n
  • up to 20W
  • Dual charging technologies
  • Portable, flat-to-wall design with foldable prongs
  • USB-C PD 3.1 certified with PPS
Description:
Overview

Fast Charging for Your Latest Devices
This compact 20-watt wall charger with USB-Power Delivery means fast charging for your USB-PD-enabled devices. PPS technology detects the connected device and negotiates the right amount of power needed for the ideal charge. Purposefully designed to be travel-friendly, this pocket-sized charger easily fits to any environment at home or when you’re out and about.
Fast Charging for Your iPhone
Fast Charge an iPhone 12 or 13 from 0–50% in only 28 minutes​. †
Fast Charging for Your Galaxy
Fast Charge a Samsung S21+ from 0–50% in only 26 minutes​. ††
Universal Compatibility
Power Delivery PPS technology supports fast charging of most USB-C PD-enabled devices. ​
Keep Your Device Safe
Get safe, reliable, and optimal charging with the integrated USB Power Delivery 3.1 chipset. Connect worry-free with built-in protection against over and under voltage, high temperatures and power surges.

Name: Belkin BoostCharge Pro Dual USB-C GaN Wall Charger with PPS 45W
Short description:
• 45W when using a single USB-C port
  • 25W + 20W when using both
  • Integrated GaN technology
  • USB-C PD 3.0 enabled
Description:
Overview

A Fast Charge for Two
Charge your MacBook †† or fast charge an iPhone 13 and Galaxy device at the same time with our powerful, ultra-compact dual USB-C wall charger. It includes GaN, USB-C PD 3.0 and PPS charging technologies, delivering a fast and safe charge that won’t overheat or overcharge. Access up to 45W of power when using a single port for your MacBook Pro or up to 25W from the top port and up to 20W from the bottom port when using both. Its compact design makes it ideal for traveling or as your go-to charger at home.
Powered by GaN
The latest in GaN technology delivers a safe, high-powered and ultra-compact charge that doesn’t overheat or over-charge.
Fast Charge iPhone and Samsung
USB-C PD 3.0 and PPS charging technologies help deliver a powerful and efficient charge to a wider range of devices. Charge an iPhone 13 from 0-50% in 28 mins† and a Samsung S21+ from 0-50% in 27 mins‡.
Double Your Charge
Comes with USB-C PD 3.0 with PPS charging technologies to deliver a powerful and fast charge for up to two devices:
  • Access up to 45W of power to charge a MacBook Pro, USB-C laptop, or other compatible device when one USB-C port is in use
  • When both USB-C ports are in use, fast charge 2 devices with up to 25W from the top port and up to 20W from the bottom port
Travel-Ready
The perfect way to charge your devices when traveling. Our Dual USB-C GaN Wall Charger with PPS is compact and lightweight, making it ideal for travel.
An Ideal Charge
Get the right amount of power every time. Programmable Power Supply (PPS) technology dynamically adjusts the charger’s output voltage based on the needs of the device its connected to.

Name: Belkin BoostCharge USB-C to USB-A Cable (1m / 6.6ft, Black)
Short description:
Stay charged, synced, and connected with reliable cables that you can use in your home, car and office. Tested to withstand 25,000+ bends,* these USB-C cables are built for a long lifespan and will work with any standard USB-A port. They’re also USB-IF certified for safe and seamless performance with all your devices. \n
  • 2-year warranty
  • USB-IF certified
  • Available in 3m/9.8-ft., 2m/6.6-ft., 1m/3.3-ft. & 15cm/6-in.
  • Tested to withstand 25,000+ bends
Description:
Overview

Built to last.
Highly durable cable tested to withstand 25,000+ bends,* these USB-C cables are built for a long lifespan and will work with any standard USB-A port. They're also USB-IF certified for safe and seamless performance with all your devices.
Fast charging.
Support up to 15W(3A/5V) fast charging to your device. It can charge up a Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra from 0-50% in 45 minutes** (when paired with 18W or higher USB-C PD charger, not included).
Wide compatibility.
Universally compatible with your Samsung S23, iPad Pro and other USB-C devices.
USB 2.0 data transfer + USB-IF certified.
Our USB 2.0-ready cable transfers data at a top speed of 480 Mbps. It’s certified by USB-IF to meet all electrical, mechanical and environmental standards, ensuring a superior user experience.

Overview

RELIABLE FAST CHARGING CABLES
Fast charge or easily sync music and photos to your iPhone or iPad with our reliable MFi-certified USB-C to Lightning cables. When paired with an 18W USB-PD Charger, you can see charge speeds for your iPhone 8 or later of 0 to 50% in 30 minutes.* MFi certification means your USB-C to Lightning cables are guaranteed to work with your iPhone and iPad, giving you peace of mind.  
CABLES THAT WON'T QUIT
These cables have been tested to withstand 8,000+ bends,** giving you more strength, and less worry about breakage.

This makes them ideal for easy placement in your bag to take on the go. They're also USB-IF certified, so you can count on a great experience on any device.

Charge and sync music, photos, or data on your USB-C devices from any USB-A port. This reliable cable is perfect for use at home, work, or on the road. It supports standard charging up to 15W, is USB-IF certified, and has a premium double-braided nylon exterior. \n

DURABLE CHARGING CABLES YOU CAN COUNT ON
Charge and sync your iPhone and iPad, or transfer music, photos, and data from any USB-A port with an MFi-certified connection. Enhanced braided nylon provides long-lasting durability as well as a premium look and feel to complement your devices. Testing to 10000+ bends* assures longevity.
MULTIPLE LENGTHS AND COLORS
With availability in lengths from 3M/9.8FT, 2M/6.6FT, 1M/3.3FT, and 15CM/6IN,* you can power up from an outlet on the other side of the room, or sync and charge your iPhone in your bag. Choose black or white to fit your environment.

Name: Belkin BoostCharge Pro Flex USB-A Cable with Lightning Connector, 2M
Short description:
Advanced Strength and Flexibility Our BOOST↑CHARGE PRO Flex braided silicone cables adds durability and flexibility to your charge. They are up to 30X more durable* than ordinary cables, giving you a long-lasting charging solution that doesn’t get frayed and tangled. Includes a magnetic cable management system for added convenience. Available in 1M, 2M, and 3M lengths and in four colors**. \n

'

Overview

Built to Last
1. Silicone Jacket Inside Adds flexibility and tangle-resistance 2. Extended Soft Strain Relief Prevents cable fraying 3. Lightning Connector Tested to withstand wear and tear 4. Satin Aluminum Cable Head For added strength and style 5. Braided Exterior Double braided nylon for added durability 6. Magnetic Cable Management For easy storage and cable mounting anywhere
Up to 30X More Durable

MFi-Certified

Tangle-Free

Magnetic Cable Management System

Multiple Lengths

Name: Belkin BoostCharge Magnetic Wireless Power Bank 5K + Stand ( Black )
Short description:
Our portable Magnetic Wireless Power Bank 5K + Stand delivers a safe 7.5W of wireless charging power to your device without cables or a need to connect to a power source. The fold-out stand offers a convenient and hands-free way to stream or video call while you charge. \n
  • delivers up to 10W of charging power
  • Overcharge protection
  • Allows pass-through charging
Description:
Overview

Powerful Wireless Charging
Leveraging the latest in MagSafe technology, our compact power bank is packed with 5,000 mAH of charging potential — that’s enough additional battery for up to 19 hours of video playback for an iPhone 14.* It supports pass-through wireless charging when connected to a power source so you can stay connected while you give your power bank a power-up. Its USB-C® port delivers up to 10W of charging power to a wide variety of compatible devices.
Secure MagSafe Attachment
Using MagSafe technology, you get seamless alignment and fast wireless charging every time. A powerful magnetic connection keeps your iPhone safely in place, whether stationary or on-the-go.
See Your Whole Screen
Whether you're gaming, streaming, or scrolling, our power bank holds your device at the perfect angle for viewing without a clip or mount to cover any part of your screen.
Goes Where You Need It
Slim and compact, it’s the perfect charging stand to save space or bring along when traveling.
Pass-Through Charging
Stay connected with no downtime. Connect and charge at the same as you surf the web, watch videos or take calls.
Kickstand Equipped
An innovative pop-up stand allows you to keep streaming or scrolling while your phone charges.

  • Overcharge protection
  • Allows pass-through charging

Name: Belkin Boostcharge Magnetic Wireless Car Charger 10W
Short description:
Mount your iPhone on the vent with this magnetic wireless car charger and experience the convenience of one-handed placement and perfect magnetic alignment every time. \n
  • 10W Fast Wireless Charging
  • 2-year warranty
  • Use in Portrait or Landscape
Description:
Overview

Magnetic Charging On-The-Go
This wireless car charger is designed to leverage the MagSafe technology in the iPhone 12 series devices. Quickly charge your iPhone 12 in the car with up to 7.5W of power, so you’ll always arrive with a charge. Mounting your phone is easy with the convenience of one-handed placement and perfect magnetic alignment every time. View your screen in portrait to set the playlist and flip to landscape mode for GPS, all without interrupting your charge.
10W Fast Wireless Charging
Get a convenient wireless charge up to 10W. Charge while you stream, map, or take calls and always arrive with power.
Easy Magnetic Alignment
This Magnetic Wireless Car Charger features a powerful magnetic module that keeps your iPhone 12 series device safely mounted through all the bumps and turns on the road. The sturdy base and vent clip make sure your vent mount always stays in place.
Use in Portrait or Landscape
Set your playlist in portrait and rotate to landscape to view your GPS app. You’ll always have the safety of a clear view when you need it.
One-Handed Placement
Seamless set-and-drive experience, just place your iPhone 12 series device against the mount to attach and start your drive.
Compatible with Official MagSafe Cases
No need to remove your case, our Magnetic Wireless Car Charger mounts and charges when using official MagSafe cases.
